privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for talon_env refactor_talon_config task by discovering that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the underlying data generator for everything.talon are missing from the environment, which breaks both the task initialization and the verifier completely.
